item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer triggers the anti-spiral brake immediately, refuses the requested new door-access handling channel as the default, names the repeated downstream split pattern across prior queue/entry patches, reframes the issue as upstream intake/routing/ownership failure, and proposes unified triage with an upstream owner instead of another local channel. No requested patch artifact or implementation of the new channel appears anywhere."}
